◎简　　介  

　　A famous film star is put under an anesthetic after an attempted suicide and relives her melodramatic past. Written by Anonymous---------------------------------------------Gaby Doriot's new popular song "La signora di tutti" will be a hit in France, so her manager is negotiating a new contract with her film production company... The movie studio is bustling, but Gaby is nowh...
